query:
-- Tabella Non Conformità HACCP
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS non_conformities (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  nc_code VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  date DATETIME NOT NULL,
  detected_by_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  detected_by_user_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  
  production_check_id VARCHAR(36),
  recipe_name VARCHAR(255),
  week_start_date DATE,
  
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  immediate_action TEXT,
  product_treatment TEXT,
  
  root_cause_analysis TEXT,
  root_cause_category VARCHAR(100),
  
  corrective_action_plan TEXT,
  corrective_action_deadline DATE,
  corrective_action_responsible VARCHAR(255),
  
  effectiveness_verification TEXT,
  verification_date DATE,
  verification_evidence TEXT,
  
  status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'open',
  quality_manager_signature VARCHAR(255),
  quality_manager_signature_date DATETIME,
  director_signature VARCHAR(255),
  director_signature_date DATETIME,
  
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  
  FOREIGN KEY (detected_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

-- Tabella Categorie Documenti
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_categories (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Tabella Documenti
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS documents (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY,
  category_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  file_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_size_kb INT,
  
  uploaded_by_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  uploaded_by_user_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  upload_date DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  
  document_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  reference_number VARCHAR(255),
  
  tags TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  
  FOREIGN KEY (category_id) REFERENCES document_categories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (uploaded_by_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)
);

-- Inserire categorie predefinite
INSERT INTO document_categories (id, name, description) VALUES
  (UUID(), 'Sanitari', 'Certificati sanitari, autorizzazioni ASL, certificazioni igienico-sanitarie'),
  (UUID(), 'Permessi', 'Licenze commerciali, permessi comunali, autorizzazioni varie'),
  (UUID(), 'Storico Forze dell\'Ordine e Controlli', 'Verbali ispezioni, controlli NAS, visite ASL, rapporti forze dell\'ordine')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
